hero.heading: Bouncy Castle & Inflatable Rentals in Bridgewater, NS
hero.subheading: Based in Bridgewater, serving the South Shore and Nova Scotia, with larger events and selected bookings available across the Maritimes / Atlantic Canada. Travel quoted separately.

intro.heading: Premium inflatable rentals for unforgettable events.
intro.text: Nova Kingdom Rentals brings commercial-grade bouncy castle rentals, inflatable rentals, water slides, interactive games, and 360 Photo Booth to backyard birthdays, school events, festivals, community events, and summer celebrations across the South Shore and Nova Scotia. We are based in Bridgewater — setup and takedown included with every rental, and fully insured.

categories.title: Inflatables
categories.text: Bouncy castles, combos, slides, and obstacle courses.

categories.title: Water Fun
categories.text: Splash-ready water slides and combos for summer events.

categories.title: 360 Photo Booth
categories.text: Slow-motion video booth with operator — from $199.

categories.title: Interactive Games
categories.text: Axe throw, football darts, and carnival games for all ages.

categories.title: Lawn Games
categories.text: 12 games including Cornhole, Giant Jenga, and Connect 4.

categories.title: Packages
categories.text: Bundled events with built-in savings — from $310.

howItWorks.title: Choose your rental or package
howItWorks.text: Browse inflatables, water slides, lawn games, 360 Photo Booth, or packages. Pick what fits your event type, crowd size, and setup space.

howItWorks.title: Send your event details
howItWorks.text: Share your event date, address, event type, number of guests, surface type, and power or water access so we can confirm availability and travel.

howItWorks.title: We confirm, deliver, and set up
howItWorks.text: Booking is confirmed after availability, setup suitability, travel cost, and deposit details are reviewed. We handle setup and takedown.
